# Skill: write-action-items

Produce concrete, time-bound, audience-specific action items from the completed report sections.

## Input

- Completed report sections
- Target audience (`english` | `zh-tw` | `zh-tw-elder`)

## Action

Write one action item per audience segment minimum.
Every item must follow this format exactly:

`[Audience] [Action verb] [specific action] by [timeframe]`

## Output

A bullet list of action items.
